meaning: n.拉克兰河(在澳大利亚东南部)
examples: His wife, Wendi, and son Lachlan are also attending the event.
Sarah Murdoch, a fashion model and TV presenter, is married to Rupert Murdoch's son Lachlan.
Until recent rains, the Lachlan river had stopped flowing in some of the farming regions of New South Wales, the most populous state.
At the helm is executive chef Lachlan Colwill, a 27-year-old already notorious for his award-winning culinary skills.
Tension within the family is said to have been another factor in Lachlan's departure.
